blended.narrative: Anthony Lakes is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,069 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
